# services.comodoro

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.comodoro`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| ------------------------------- | -------------------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `services.comodoro.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Comodoro server. |
| `services.comodoro.environment` | `attribute set of string` | Extra environment variables to be exported in the service. |
| `services.comodoro.package` | `package` | The comodoro package to use. |
| `services.comodoro.preset` | `non-empty string` | Use configuration from the given preset as defined in the configuration file. |
| `services.comodoro.protocols` | `non-empty (list of non-empty string)` | Define protocols the server should use to accept requests. |
